mapper.select: SELECT character_name FROM userdb.character_pvp WHERE kills > 0 ORDER BY kills DESC LIMIT 100
mapper.update: UPDATE userdb.character_pvp SET top_pvp = 1 WHERE character_name = #{characterName}
UPDATE userdb.character_pvp SET kills = 0, deaths = 0, kill_streak = 0, top_pvp = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM userdb.character_pvp WHERE character_name = #{characterName}
SELECT kills, deaths, top_pvp FROM userdb.character_pvp WHERE character_name = #{characterName}
mapper.update: UPDATE userdb.character_pvp SET top_pvp = 0 WHERE character_name = #{characterName}
UPDATE userdb.character_pvp SET kills = #{kills}, deaths = #{deaths}, kill_streak = #{killStreak} WHERE character_name = #{characterName}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO userdb.character_pvp (character_name, kills, deaths, kill_streak, top_pvp) VALUES (#{characterName}, #{kills}, #{deaths}, #{killStreak}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE userdb.character_pvp SET character_name = #{newName} WHERE character_name = #{oldName}
